title: paspalum incomptum
intro: Paspalum incomptum, also known as Paspalum distachyum, is a type of grass or a plant species belonging to the Paspalum genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paspalum incomptum include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis, and its effectiveness in reducing fever and relieving headaches. In herbal preparations, Paspalum incomptum is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be applied topically to the affected area.
